nodes.label: Tests for native Discord slash command fast-paths (thread creation & auto-thread
Commands in COMMAND_REGISTRY that aren't explicitly registered should     be aut
Auto-registered commands with args_hint should accept an optional args param.
Plugin slash commands should appear as native Discord app commands.
Plugin commands without args_hint should register as parameterless.
A plugin command that collides with a built-in must not override it.
When a message is given, _dispatch_thread_session should be called.
Without a message, no session dispatch should occur.
Dispatched event should have chat_type=thread and chat_id=thread_id.
Thread names must not contain raw <@id>, <@&id>, or <#id> markers.      Regressi
If a message contains only mention syntax, the stripped content is     empty — f
A channel that is NOT a discord.Thread or discord.DMChannel.
When DISCORD_AUTO_THREAD=true, a new thread is created and the event routes ther
Without DISCORD_AUTO_THREAD env var, auto-threading is enabled (default: true).
Setting DISCORD_AUTO_THREAD=false keeps messages in the channel.
Auto-thread should not create threads inside existing threads.
discord.auto_thread in config.yaml should be bridged to DISCORD_AUTO_THREAD env
_register_skill_group should register a single flat ``/skill`` command.      The
No /skill command should be registered when there are zero skills.
The /skill callback should look up the skill by ``name`` and     dispatch via ``
Passing a name that isn't a registered skill should respond with     an ephemera
The /skill command registration payload must stay under Discord's     ~8000-byte
The autocomplete callback should match on both skill name and     description so
